## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the transition of social media management for GrowthX from Napa to GrowthX's internal team, and maintain a positive relationship between the companies.](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX will take over their own social media management, using the Assembly platform](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - Napa will transfer the Assembly account ownership to GrowthX (<team@growthxlabs.com>)
  - [Both parties agreed to maintain a friendly relationship, with potential future interactions in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Napa provided insights on effective content creation processes for busy executives](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)

## Topics

### Social Media Management Transition

  - [GrowthX decided to manage their social media internally instead of continuing with Napa](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Jameson took responsibility for miscommunication about the initial arrangement](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [The transition appears amicable, with no hard feelings on either side](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Napa will transfer the Assembly platform account to GrowthX for continued use](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

### Assembly Platform Overview

  - [Assembly is preferred over Buffer for social media management](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Basic plan: $50/month, includes 4 social profiles and unlimited users](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [Additional profiles: $20/month each](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Features include idea management, approval processes, and scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)
  - [Napa offered to provide a guide and support for using Assembly](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Key challenge: Extracting information from busy executives](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Approach: Ask questions to elicit stories and content](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Utilize existing resources like call recordings and customer interactions](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [Napa suggested leveraging GrowthX's customer conversations for positioning to generate content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### San Francisco Meetup

  - [GrowthX has a new office near South Park (95 Federal Street)](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in meeting when Napa team is in San Francisco](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [Discussed potential for attending a Giants game together (box rental \~$4,000 for up to 20 people)](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Brief discussion about Las Vegas trips and gun range experiences](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Kevin recently moved to San Francisco (Pac Heights) from LA](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [GrowthX plans to host marketing and AI-focused events in their new office](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)

## Next Steps

  - Napa to initiate Assembly account transfer to <team@growthxlabs.com>
  - [GrowthX to confirm receipt of invoice and process payment](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Both parties to stay in touch for potential San Francisco meetups and events](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=692.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore Assembly platform and reach out to Napa with any questions](https://fathom.video/share/ZYm8F98kw14sWFXqN5gqTTYLF7Ayiapb?tab=summary&timestamp=365.0)
